crafting table: To craft a Crafting Table, place 4 Wood Planks in a 2x2 square in your inventory crafting grid.
furnace: To craft a Furnace, place 8 Cobblestone in a ring in the crafting table, leaving the center empty.
torch: To craft a Torch, place 1 Coal (or Charcoal) directly above 1 Stick in a crafting grid. Yields 4 Torches.
iron pickaxe: To craft an Iron Pickaxe, place 3 Iron Ingots in a row across the top of a crafting table, with 2 Sticks vertically in the center below.
diamond sword: To craft a Diamond Sword, place 2 Diamonds vertically in the top and center slots of a crafting table, with 1 Stick in the bottom slot.
